rulings.Case Title: MYRA DANIELS VS. ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S All Hallows Preservation Lp'S Motion To Consolidate Actions With Case #530372 Involving The Same Questions Of Law, Facts And Witnesses And To Vacate Trial Or Continue Trial 120 Days
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 1 - Defendant'S All Hallows Preservation Lp'S Motion To Consolidate Actions With Case #530372 Involving The Same Questions Of Law, Facts And Witnesses And To Vacate Trial Or Continue Trial 120 Days. Defendant's Motion to Consolidate Actions is DENIED. Prejudice to parties outweighs any consideration of judicial economy and convenience of witnesses. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: SALLIE PLASSMEYER VS. BANANA BELT PROPERTIES et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO MENDOCINO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Transfer Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT BANANA BELT PROPERTIES, J SCOTT, KAREN SCOTT's Motion To Transfer Action. Defendants Banana Belt Properties' Motion to Transfer Action is GRANTED. Venue is transferred to Mendocino County. Opposing party failed to comply with this Court's order of June 25, 2013 and failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: SALLIE PLASSMEYER VS. BANANA BELT PROPERTIES et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO MENDOCINO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Transfer Action And Correction Of Error In Mtn To Transfer Motion
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT REDWOOD EMPIRE TITLE COMPANY OF MENDOCINO COUNTY's Motion To Transfer Action. Defendant Redwood Empire Title Company Motion to Transfer Action is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with this Court's order of June 25, 2013 and failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. ETHEL MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT ETHEL MARTIN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record. Hearing Required. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. KENNETT TAYLOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Of Apr-16-2013
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT KENNETT TAYLOR's Motion To Set Aside The Judgment Of Apr-16-2013. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) and/or CCP 663. Defendant failed to show fraud or extrinsic mistake. Defendant failed to comply with CRC 3.1112. Defendant failed to file Reply papers. =(501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: THAKOR, BALWANTSINH DBA KEAN HOTEL VS. LISA FERRARI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF BALWANTSINH THAKOR DBA KEAN HOTEL'S Motion To Amend The Judgment. Plaintiff's Motion to Amend Judgment is GRANTED. Amended judgment for $6,823.82. No opposition filed. =(501/hd)

rulings.Case Title: DINAH BLANSON VS. APRIL BLANSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 26, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT APRIL BLANSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges cause of action for unlawful detainer brought by owner of the property and is not uncertain. =(501/HD)
